song.title: R79 Lord Keep My Heart Open
song.lyrics:
[1] Lord, keep my heart open and soft toward You. Lord, draw my eyes to see nothing else but You.
[2] Whatever may happen, I know You want to gain my heart. Though I may not understand, Just keep dispensing into my every part.
[3] Make me a believer By looking at You. Standing on Your Word, Faithful and true.
